label: Transparent Cilantro motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Cilantro transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a compact cilantro leaf sprig, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: fresh cilantro leaves with accurate scalloped lobed leaflets, delicate branching pale cream stems, varied lime-green and cilantro-leaf greens, visible fine leaf veins and slight matte botanical texture, market-garden freshness without showing soil, basket, hands, labels, or other herbs.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural soft studio light.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: quick task system mood, bright, clean, efficient, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: cilantro leaf green, lime green highlights, pale stem cream, faint garden-neutral shadows only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no props, no market crate, no second herb, no flowers, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Cilantro motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Cilantro".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: quick task system for a market-garden operations app: task capture, harvest queue, route checklist, team handoff, and rapid status triage; efficient, fresh, scannable, calm, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the cilantro reference motif: cilantro leaf green, lime green leaf highlights, deep leaf-shadow green, pale cream stems, washed stem-cream backgrounds, faint herb-shadow neutrals. Do not use generic blue, purple, red, orange, or unrelated saturated colors.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small cilantro motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "シラントロ", "今日の作業", "収穫", "完了".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, task cards, harvest queue, checklist, route timeline, small chart, loading, empty, error, success, warning, and pending states.
Texture/materials: subtle scalloped cilantro leaflet edge pattern, fine leaf-vein texture, pale stem-cream dividers, lime green focus rings, dense 8px card rhythm, restrained shadows from leaf overlap.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no abstract gradients, no blue/purple default UI, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Cilantro". This is a CILANTRO quick task system for market-garden operations only. Ignore any Basil, Mint, Rosemary, Thyme, Tea Leaf, recipe, cooking, creator, or finance boards visible in the surrounding context.
Reference use: Use the cilantro sprig motif and the Morphous Cilantro light quick-task board as the only style references: scalloped cilantro leaflets, branching pale cream stems, lime green highlights, deep cilantro leaf shadows, quick task and harvest operations UI.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: quick task system for market-garden operations: task capture, harvest queue, route checklist, team handoff, and rapid status triage; night-mode dispatch desk, dense, fresh, precise, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from cilantro: deep cilantro leaf-shadow backgrounds, dark herb green panels, fresh cilantro green primary controls, lime leaf-highlight charts, pale cream-stem text, washed stem-cream borders and dividers. Status colors must stay herb-derived: success, warning, error, destructive, pending, and info use only deep leaf green, muted olive, pale stem cream, lime green, and cream neutrals. No red, orange, blue, purple, neon, or unrelated saturated colors anywhere.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small cilantro motif cutout preview, not basil or thyme.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "シラントロ", "今日の作業", "収穫", "完了".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, task cards, harvest queue, checklist, route timeline, small chart, loading, empty, error, success, warning, and pending states.
Texture/materials: subtle scalloped cilantro leaflet edge pattern, dark leaf-vein texture, pale stem-cream dividers, lime green focus rings, dense 8px card rhythm, restrained shadows from leaf overlap.
Hard exclusions: no recipe cards, no food photos, no kitchen, no cooking timers, no creator dashboard, no basil plant, no mint sprig, no rosemary twig, no thyme branch, no tea leaf, no red/orange/yellow/blue/purple alert defaults, no watermark.
